'''鈭歞-f-th-f''' ('''kadafthefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photopolymerize|photopolymerize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photopolymerize|photopolymerize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-f-th-f
|-
! Lemma
| kadafthefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidafthefoko|thidafthefoko]] || [[word:jidafthefoko|jidafthefoko]] || [[word:shidafthefoko|shidafthefoko]] || [[word:kidafthefoko|kidafthefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodafthefoko|thodafthefoko]] || [[word:jodafthefoko|jodafthefoko]] || [[word:shodafthefoko|shodafthefoko]] || [[word:kodafthefoko|kodafthefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dafthefoko|th忙dafthefoko]] || [[word:j忙dafthefoko|j忙dafthefoko]] || [[word:sh忙dafthefoko|sh忙dafthefoko]] || [[word:k忙dafthefoko|k忙dafthefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadafthefoko|thadafthefoko]] || [[word:jadafthefoko|jadafthefoko]] || [[word:shadafthefoko|shadafthefoko]] || [[word:kadafthefoko|kadafthefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadafthefoko|thadafthefoko]] || [[word:jadafthefoko|jadafthefoko]] || [[word:shadafthefoko|shadafthefoko]] || [[word:kadafthefoko|kadafthefoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
